notes: DigitalTQ 1,004-pack sample: rare holo 26.39%, V 14.94%, ultra rare (full/alt arts) 4.98%, VSTAR 1.89%, VMAX 1.89%, gold 1.49%, rainbow 1.29%. Trainer Gallery rate (12%/pack, reverse slot) from an independent 720-pack Reddit sample (u/ABkCkay via PokePatch), consistent with TCGplayer TG rates for the sibling SWSH9-12 sets (~12.3-12.6%). TCGplayer opened 10,000+ packs (table published only as an image, cited as corroboration; their hit rate for this set was 44%). No radiant in this set. Residual mass on non-holo rare; reverse filler 50/50 common/uncommon. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. SWSH ETB contains 8 packs.
